hero.title: The Last Billboard
hero.tagline: The final advertising space. Compete for visibility. Winner takes all.

explanation.title: How it works
explanation.text: Advertisers bid for space on a shared canvas. Your ad size grows logarithmically with your bid. Others can displace you by bidding higher. When the countdown ends, the billboard freezes forever.

login.title: Login to The Last Billboard
login.checkEmail: Check your email for the magic link!
login.error: Failed to send magic link. Please try again.

dashboard.title: My Bids
dashboard.empty: You haven't placed any bids yet.
dashboard.emptyAction: Place your first bid to claim space on the billboard.

about.title: About The Last Billboard
about.content: The Last Billboard is an experiment in digital scarcity and advertising competition.
